entries.description: budgetBlockHtml gated on transportProfile (omit on copilot-cli); block nested as indented child of the Direct-API option row inside transportProfileBlockHtml; standalone render call removed; tree.css gs-option-child indent + separator-restore rules.

client.js: Build validates/posts budget riders only while Direct-API is selected (transportProfile rider always rides Full); gettingStartedActions.ts: asBudgetChoice drops rider on copilot-cli, fail-closed reject scoped to Full+api; gitScaffold.ts: effectiveBudget caller condition (copilot-cli passes no budget to the scaffold step; writeBudgetYaml unchanged); runScaffold seam carries the effective budget for Layer-2 observability.

New Layer-2 suites: placement/visibility (Full+api nested under the api row; Full+copilot omitted incl. no empty child wrapper; Lightweight absent), persistence (typed value + zero-rule pick survive api->copilot->api flip), Build matrix (api+budget threads budget; copilot-cli drops it), action-router matrix (Full+copilot dispatches budgetless; Full+api stays fail-closed). No semantic edits to pre-existing budget parsing / zero-rule / no-clobber tests.
routed_gate verdict REQUIRED (breadth: 8 files >= 4) -> cross-provider session-verification will run.
tsc --noEmit clean; Layer-2 mocha 1265 passing / 0 failing; Layer-3 Playwright 19/19 passed locally (L-064-12 — Explorer-rendering surface touched).
